title: Polling rates explained: do you really need 8,000Hz for keyboards and mice in 2026?
summary: If we look back at TenZ's mouse and keyboard settings when playing VALORANT , he last used the Pulsar TenZ Signature Edition mouse at 1,600 DPI, 0.24 sensitivity, and (most crucially) a 1,000Hz polling rate as standard; no 4K, and certainly no…
